text.title: pain-point-research Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pain-point-research as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Inflating Reach to 5 ("everyone has this") without three distinct sources mentioning it.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Complaints are loud and unrepresentative. Cap Reach at 4 unless multiple independent sources confirm broad prevalence.

failure-mode.description: Splitting scoring across multiple agent calls, each with a fresh context window.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The scoring rubric drifts between calls; item 40 gets a different standard than item 1. Score the full batch in one agent call with the rubric in the system prompt.

failure-mode.description: Mining only one source type (e.g., only Reddit) and treating results as representative.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reddit skews toward complainers and outliers. The "fine but mediocre" majority — where most opportunity lives — doesn't post there.
